generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance PhysicalObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin's Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalObjectTrackingModel
]

instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data from onboard sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from onboard sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC model compliant with ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance CPlusPlusEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ACCEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for point cloud processing using MATLAB/Simulink and Python"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system execution on digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeedInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, driving path, and vehicle state"
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC computes desired speed based on lead vehicle to inform driver or autonomous control decisions"
]

instance DataSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data saving to SQL database"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generation from stored data"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built by retrofitting a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle"
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4Vehicle, NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator, PhysicalObjectTrackingModel
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment for the autonomous vehicle"
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity, DataCollectionFE, ActuationFE
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Vehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle retrofitted with autonomy components"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for communication"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor voltage command"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle direction control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Physical Twin Entity"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Entity"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 User Entity"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Cross-System Entity"
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for Data Collection"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for Actuation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands from the digital twin to the physical twin's motor and steering actuators, with end-to-end latency <= 100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with end-to-end latency of at most 100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms between components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity (on vehicle/cloud), User Entity (remote UI), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); components communicate via ROS2 internally and Wi-Fi between entities."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily in the design and development phase for ACC system validation, with operational use for monitoring and remote management; represents the physical twin as operated."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for internal communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE for serialization, message alignment, and unit conversion; latency <=100 ms as per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle's Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity components deployed on vehicle and cloud; external SQL database for data storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ACC implementation follows ISO 15622."
]
